name: Open Telemark
preceding_figure_names: Back Whisk, Basic Weave, Contra Check, Fallaway Whisk, Open Impetus, Open Telemark, Outside Change, Turning Lock, Turning Lock to R, Weave From Promenade Position, Whisk
following_figure_names: Closed Telemark, Open Telemark, Double Reverse Spin, Progressive Chasse To R, Reverse Turn, Drag Hesitation, Fallaway Reverse And Slip Pivot, Whisk
notes:
Wing can be used from other positions.
Less turn can be made on Wing to end facing LOD.
See Closed Telemark for leading Lady to do heel turn.

steps.action: Moves forward DC, starts to turn left, sway, CBM, rise
Steps to side BDW, T, sway left, up
Steps to side and slightly forward in PP, pointing DW, body facing wall, sway, up, lower
Moves forward across in PP and CBMP, pointing to LOD, H, sway S
comments: This is "Wing". See Open Impetus and Wing.

steps.action: Closes to RF without weight, pressure on T of RF flat, body turn on 5, sway S, slight rise on 5 and 6, NFR
comments: No foot swivel, but body turn only to face LOD

steps.action: Closes to RF without weight, FDC, same as step 5, sway S
comments: Foot swivel is used to end facing DC

steps.action: Steps back BDC, start to turn left, sway, CBM, rise slightly
comments: This is "Open Telemark". See "Closed Telemark" for leading Lady to do heel turn.

steps.action: Closes to RF (Heel Turn), FLOD, HT, sway R, continue rise
Diagonal forward and slightly to R in PP, R side leading, pointing LOD, slight body turn to L, sway S, up, lower
Moves forward in PP and CBMP, FDC, HT, sway S, CBM, start to rise
Steps forward preparing to step OP on L side, facing Centre, T, sway L, continue to rise
comments: Right side leading. Head up and leftward.

steps.action: Steps forward in CBMP, OP on L side, facing against LOD, continue to turn to BDC, sway L, up, lower
